timerConfig.title: Extensible Timer

shoutout.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all configuration to default values?

soundAlerts.durationError: Duration must be between 3 and 30 seconds

soundAlerts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?

timers.noDeletePermission: You don't have permission to delete timers
timers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the timer "{{name}}"?
timers.noTestPermission: You don't have permission to test timers
timers.accessDeniedDesc: You don't have sufficient permissions to manage chat timers.
timers.title: Chat Timers
timers.subtitle: Automatic chat messages at regular intervals
timers.limitReachedDesc: You have reached the maximum of 20 timers. Delete one to create new ones.
timers.noTimersDesc: Create your first timer to send automatic messages in chat.
timers.categoryHelp: If you assign a category, the timer will only run when you are in that category
timers.categoryEditHelp: Current category: {{name}}. Select another to change it.
timers.categoryEditHelpEmpty: No category assigned. Search for one to filter.
timers.priorityHelp: Timers with higher priority execute first (1 = highest)

tipsConfig.title: Tips / Donations
tipsConfig.subtitle: Receive donations through PayPal with integrated alerts
tipsConfig.paypalError: Error connecting to PayPal. Please try again.
tipsConfig.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect PayPal? Donations will stop working.
tipsConfig.connectDesc: Connect your PayPal account to receive donations
tipsConfig.donationsSentTo: Donations will be sent directly to {{email}}. Decatron does not retain any percentage.

donations.title: Donations
donations.subtitle: Analytics, history and donor ranking
donations.top20: Top 20 donors for the selected period

decatronChat.noPermission: You don't have permissions to access the AI chat.

decatronChat.selectOrCreate: Select a conversation or create a new one
decatronChat.inputPlaceholder: Type your message... (Shift+Enter for new line)

giveaway.title: Giveaway System
giveaway.subtitle: Create professional giveaways with requirements, weights and validations
giveaway.cannotSaveActive: You cannot save while there is an active giveaway

followAlert.title: Follow Alerts
followAlert.subtitle: Automatically thank your new followers
followAlert.enableDescription: Send automatic message when someone follows your channel
followAlert.cooldownDescription: Minimum time between messages for the same user (prevents spam from unfollow/follow)
followAlert.importantNote: Follow alerts only work if you have EventSub configured correctly. Make sure you have registered the event

eventAlerts.title: Event Alerts
eventAlerts.subtitle: Configure alerts for follows, bits, subs, raids and more Twitch events
eventAlerts.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all configuration?
eventAlerts.testError: Error sending test alert. Verify the overlay is open.
eventAlerts.selectEventTab: Select an event tab to see the preview

decatronAI.noPermission: You don't have sufficient permissions to access Decatron AI. Access level "Full Control" is required.
decatronAI.needSpecialPermission: You need special permissions to configure Decatron AI on this channel. Contact the developer to request access.
decatronAI.title: Decatron AI
decatronAI.configureForChannel: Configure the AI for the channel

users.whitelistDisabled: Whitelist disabled. The configured permission level is used.

goals.title: Goals System
goals.subtitle: Configure interactive goals with multiple sources and milestones

shoutoutTabs.overlayDurationDesc: How long the shoutout will be visible on screen
shoutoutTabs.cooldownDesc: Wait time before another shoutout to the same user (prevents spam)
shoutoutTabs.textVarsHint: Use @username for the name and @game for the game
shoutoutTabs.dragTip: Drag elements to position them on the overlay. Dimensions are 1000x300 (OBS ratio).
shoutoutTabs.animDesc: Select how the overlay appears and disappears
shoutoutTabs.outlineDesc: Adds a border around the text for better contrast
shoutoutTabs.borderDesc: Adds a rectangular border around the entire overlay
shoutoutTabs.previewDesc: Send a test shoutout to the overlay to see animations and effects in action. Make sure the overlay is open in OBS or in the browser.
shoutoutTabs.blacklistDesc: Users who CANNOT receive shoutouts. When someone tries to !so user someone on this list, the command will be ignored.
shoutoutTabs.whitelistDesc: ADDITIONAL users who can execute !so besides mods and streamer. Moderators and the streamer can ALWAYS use the command (unless they are in the blacklist). This list is for adding extra viewers.
shoutoutTabs.emptyWhitelist: Empty list - All moderators can use !so
shoutoutTabs.testShoutoutDesc: Send a test shoutout to the overlay to see how it looks with your current configuration. Make sure the overlay is open in OBS or in the browser.
shoutoutTabs.showCountdownDesc: Shows the remaining time in the corner of the overlay (useful for adjusting duration)
shoutoutTabs.debugNote: Remember to save the configuration after changing debug options.

soundAlertsTabs.alertDurationDesc: How long the alert will be visible on screen
soundAlertsTabs.outlineDesc: Adds a border around the text to improve readability
soundAlertsTabs.cooldownDesc: Minimum time between alerts to prevent spam
soundAlertsTabs.testAlertDesc: Send a test alert to the overlay to see how it looks with your current configuration.
soundAlertsTabs.manageAlertFilesDesc: Select a channel points reward to assign a sound, video or image file
soundAlertsTabs.createRewardsFirst: Create rewards in your Twitch panel first
soundAlertsTabs.changesRealtime: Changes are reflected in real time
soundAlertsTabs.tipObs: Add this URL as a Browser Source in OBS
soundAlertsTabs.tipAutoActivate: Alerts are automatically triggered by channel point redemptions
soundAlertsTabs.uploadOwnFileDesc: Upload your own sound, video or image file
soundAlertsTabs.addImageQuestion: Do you want to add an image to show during the audio?
soundAlertsTabs.defaultImageHint: If you don't select an image, a default icon will be shown

tipsTabs.enableTipsDesc: Enable the donation page and alerts
tipsTabs.descriptionPlaceholder: Your donation helps me keep creating content...
tipsTabs.alertModeDesc: Choose how you want to handle donation alerts:
tipsTabs.independentAlertsDesc: Own alert system for Tips with sound, TTS, multimedia and tiers by amount.
tipsTabs.timerSystemDesc: Uses the same alert system as bits, subs and raids. Includes variants, advanced multimedia, TTS and more.
tipsTabs.donationAlertsInTimer: Donation alerts are configured in the Extensible Timer along with bits, subs and other events.
tipsTabs.alertsTabHint: Look for the "Alerts" tab and select "Donations" to configure variants by amount, sounds, videos and more.
tipsTabs.timerCapabilities: With the Timer system you can:
tipsTabs.timerCap6: View donations in the timer history
tipsTabs.timerIntegrationDesc: Adds time to the timer when you receive donations
tipsTabs.autoAddTime: Time will be automatically added to the Extensible Timer
tipsTabs.blockBadWordsDesc: Uses the same banned words list from chat moderation
tipsTabs.requireMessageDesc: The donor must write a message to complete the donation
